heading: Authority of Secretary of the Interior for acquisition of Indian land
label: 833o Authority of Secretary of the Interior for acquisition of Indian land
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to perform any and all acts and to prescribe such regulations as he may deem appropriate to carry out the provisions of sections 833 to 833p of this title.l
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of act , which comprises this chapter.May 18, 1938

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of other officers, employees, and agencies of Department of the Interior, with certain exceptions, to Secretary of the Interior, with power to delegate, see Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1950, §§ 1, 2, eff. , 15 F.R. 3174, , set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.May 24, 195064 Stat. 1262
